meaning: n.(西藏高原的)雪人(常作Yeti,=Abominable Snowman)
examples: Only Stan the Yeti can enter the Biology Building Secure Lab 6.
The Yeti jacket — so-named for obvious reasons — was lauded for its incredible warmth and lightness.
The Yeti visualizations automatically group together the instances of objects into larger cohesive units.
Indeed, as alleged by EA, Zynga probably did less to modify its UI than Yeti Town did.
This bloom is so rare, in fact, that it was once thought to be a Himalayan myth, like the Yeti.
